title: Flaky Test Triage
description: Detect and quantify flaky tests — compute a suite-wide flake rate and a per-test flake score from reruns and CI history, and flag any test that passes-on-retry or fails only in certain orders. Classify each flake by root cause (async/timing, shared state & ordering, external dependencies, animations, time/locale/randomness, resource leaks) using tell-tale signals, then fix it at the root: web-first assertions over sleeps, per-test isolation over shared fixtures, mock only what you don't own, frozen clocks and seeded RNG, disabled animations, and disposed resources. When a fix can't land immediately, quarantine with discipline — tag `@flaky`, move it to a non-blocking lane, and require an owner, a tracking issue, and an SLA — never blanket retries. Enforces guardrails against hiding flake behind `retries`, deleting the failing test to make CI green, and quarantining forever with no owner or SLA; a quarantine un-quarantines only after N consecutive green runs, and a breached SLA auto-escalates to fix-or-delete.
